---
title: "Contact"
description-meta: "Contact information for Fuseini Aboagye"
toc: false
page-navigation: false
---

<style>

#quarto-margin-sidebar,
#TOC,
.sidebar,
.toc,
nav[role="doc-toc"]{
    display:none !important;
}

main.content{
    max-width:850px !important;
}

.contact-intro{
    font-size:18px;
    line-height:1.8;
    margin-bottom:35px;
    color:#000;
}

.contact-item{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    margin-bottom:28px;
    font-size:20px;
}

.contact-item svg,
.contact-item i{
    width:38px;
    font-size:28px;
    margin-right:18px;
}

.email{
    color:#EA4335;
}

.phone{
    color:#198754;
}

.location{
    color:#F57C00;
}

.linkedin{
    color:#0A66C2;
}

.scholar{
    color:#4285F4;
}

.researchgate{
    color:#00CCBB;
}

.github{
    color:#181717;
}

.contact-item a{
    text-decoration:none;
}

.contact-item a:hover{
    text-decoration:underline;
}

</style>

<div class="contact-intro">

I welcome opportunities for research collaboration, graduate study discussions, academic networking, teaching, and professional engagements. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.

</div>

<div class="contact-item">

<span class="email">{{< fa envelope >}}</span>

<a href="mailto:aboagyefuseini@gmail.com">
aboagyefuseini@gmail.com
</a>

</div>

<div class="contact-item">

<span class="phone">{{< fa phone >}}</span>

+233 20 984 0096

</div>

<div class="contact-item">

<span class="location">{{< fa location-dot >}}</span>

Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science<br>
University of Ghana<br>
Accra, Ghana

</div>

<div class="contact-item">

<span class="linkedin">{{< fa brands linkedin >}}</span>

<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/fuseini-aboagye-8379aa237" target="_blank">
LinkedIn
</a>

</div>

<div class="contact-item">

<span class="scholar">{{< ai google-scholar >}}</span>

<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=2NIQbBwAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" target="_blank">
Google Scholar
</a>

</div>

<div class="contact-item">

<span class="researchgate">{{< ai researchgate >}}</span>

<a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Fuseini-Aboagye?ev=hdr_xprf" target="_blank">
ResearchGate
</a>

</div>

<div class="contact-item">

<span class="github">{{< fa brands github >}}</span>

<a href="https://github.com/faboagye" target="_blank">
GitHub
</a>

</div>
